productDisplayName: Nike Men Navy Cricket Track Pants
description: A pair of navy blue knitted track pants engineered with Dri-Fit and Stay Cool technologies that keep you dry, sweat-free and cool, has an elasticated waistband with drawstrings on the front, an insert pocket with a trim on either side of the waist on the front, branding on the left thigh, printed detail on the back below the waistband, stitched detail throughoutWarranty: 6 months against manufacturing defects (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)
